name: Cosmicа
description: Cosmika is a girl who constantly gets into trouble. For as long as she can remember, a scientific organization has been secretly pursuing her, trying to steal her for experiments, and it is only by miracle that the girl has not yet been caught. The girl had no parents. all she remembers is only the bright light of laboratories and the sounds of assembly machines.. Because of this, Cosmika realizes that she is not an ordinary person..
creator: Tikvatikva
